[ OPEN GIG DIRECTORY ]

Live creator gigs board.

Students, homemakers, and micro-influencers apply directly to vetted brands. No agency representation required. All payouts go directly to your bank account.

#GIG-1180

Protein Smoothie ASMR & Morning Routine

FitGlow Nutrition•Fitness & Supplements

Looking for a college student creator to film a native dorm room/apartment aesthetic morning routine making our protein smoothie. Pacing should be fast-cut ASMR.

[COLLEGE STUDENT]APPLY
#GIG-2250

Bed Sheet Unboxing & Fold Demonstration

Linen & Loom•Home & Bedding

We need a housewife creator to demonstrate the unboxing, texture test, and quick sheet changing of our premium cotton sets. Highlighting dust resistance.

[HOUSEWIFE]APPLY
#GIG-3320

7-Day Hydration Glow Challenge Review

Aura Skincare•Beauty & Wellness

Beauty influencer needed for a progress comparison review of our hyaluronic serum. Need before-after shots showing skin brightness.

[INFLUENCER]APPLY
Browse All Live Gigs
[ CONVERSION MECHANICS ]

Designed to convert.
Structured to scale.

A complete sourcing, scripting, and mobile-native post-production pipeline built to scale your creative testing cycle.

[CREATOR SOURCE]

Targeted Creator Sourcing

We seed your product directly to vetted college students, housewives, and micro-influencers. Get real aesthetic dorm rooms, cozy kitchens, and native daily setups.

  • Vetted profiles (8% pass rate)
  • 100% rate transparency
  • Physical product seeding logistics
View rate guidelines
[DR SCRIPTING]

Direct-Response Scripting

Our copywriting team drafts custom storyboards and visual scripts designed to hook viewers in 1.5 seconds. We script multiple hook variations for every test run.

  • High-retention hooks formula
  • Auditory pacing structures
  • Storyboards approved before shooting
View rate guidelines
[NATIVE EDITING]

Conversion-First Editing

Raw footage is spliced in-house. We apply native TikTok/Reels captions, callout banners, zoom-cuts, and custom sound effects (SFX) to optimize watch time.

  • Caption overlays & text graphics
  • Lighting & grading correction
  • 90-day paid media usage rights
View rate guidelines
[ DYNAMIC WORKFLOW ]

How we get it done,
step by step.

Hover over any process card on the right to examine deliverables, operational parameters, and how we extract direct response performance at each stage.

[ FOCUS WORKFLOW: STAGE 01 ]

Product & Brand Story Extraction

We run structured interviews to extract what makes your product unique, translating features into visual hooks.

STAGE DELIVERABLES LOG:
USPs ExtractionFounder InterviewsAngles Blueprint
01

Product & Brand Story Extraction

We run structured interviews to extract what makes your product unique, translating features into visual hooks.

USPs ExtractionFounder InterviewsAngles Blueprint
02

Competitor & Angle Research

+

We audit competitor ad creative library logs, check visual structures, and discover what angle is converting right now.

Ad Account AuditingComment MiningHook Audits
03

Visual Storyboarding & Matching

+

We storyboard the visual hooks, body demonstration, and closing CTA formats before writing the copy.

Storyboard DraftsCreator Selection briefsVisual Framing specs
04

Direct-Response Scripting

+

We construct direct-response copy designed to stop scrolling, retaining native TikTok/Reels auditory pacing.

Hook Variation MatricesNative Auditory pacingCallouts Copy
05

Computer Graphics & Overlays

+

We add high-impact progress bars, native text tags, and vector graphics to maximize watch time.

Native caption renderingWatch-time barsSkeuomorphic text blocks
06

Vetted Shooting & Editing

+

Creators shoot footage based on storyboards, and our in-house team splices content with hook effects.

Creator SeedingNative Mobile EditingSplicing QC check
07

Nano & Micro Seeding

+

We coordinate influencer whitelisting and direct seeding setups to run ads through creator handles.

Creator SeedingSpark/Partnership AdsDirect Whitelisting

Transparent pricing.
No agency retainer fees.

Order as a one-off campaign or refresh assets monthly. Vetted creator rates are passed directly with zero agency markup fees.

Got Questions?

Frequently asked
questions.

Everything you need to know about creator whitelisting, scripting rights, and turnaround times.

Traditional agencies act as middlemen—they buy video content from creators for $150 and sell it to you for $400, pocketing a large markup. iGigster is a direct-hiring directory. You pay creators their exact, affordable rates directly. We only charge a small flat booking fee ($19) to coordinate, script, and edit the final videos, saving you up to 60% on your content budget.

We accept less than 8% of creators who apply. We test each creator on: camera sensor quality (1080p/4K native mobile), natural lighting setup, voice articulation, hook pacing, and editing awareness. Every creator listed has completed at least 3 successful direct-response campaigns.

Our standard turnaround is 6 to 7 working days. The timeline begins the moment the creator receives your physical product. This includes 2 days for creator shooting, 2 days for our professional editors to apply graphics/subtitles, and 1 day for final QC check before delivery.

All creators on our platform support seeding. You can run ads directly through their social handles (Spark Ads on TikTok or Partnership Ads on Instagram). The standard usage license covers 90 days of paid distribution, with options to extend for unlimited whitelisting directly in the booking panel.

We offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If the creator misses a script detail or mispronounces a brand term outlined in the creative brief, they will re-shoot the footage for free. If you want to adjust the pacing, captions, or music, our in-house editing team provides one round of edits free of charge.

igigster.

A premium matchmaking marketplace matching DTC brands directly with part-time creators (students, housewives, and influencers). Zero agency markups.
